```{r Validation rule 20: unknown pathogen manually entered}
problems <- problems |>
  dplyr::bind_rows(
    data$infectiousAgentFindings |>
      dplyr::filter(.data$pathogen_key == 0L) |>
      dplyr::left_join(data$unknownPathogenNames, dplyr::join_by("agent_finding_key")) |>
      dplyr::inner_join(
        data$events |>
          dplyr::select("event_key", "patient_key", "enrollment_key"),
        dplyr::join_by("event_key")) |>
      dplyr::anti_join(
        exceptions |> dplyr::filter(.data$rule_id == 20L),
        dplyr::join_by("event_key")) |>
      tidyr::nest(context = c("index", "secondary_bsi", "name")) |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        rule_id        = 20L,
        patient_key    = .data$patient_key,
        enrollment_key = .data$enrollment_key,
        event_key      = .data$event_key,
        context        = .data$context,
        .keep = "none"))
```
